name: auction-harness
description: The team-architecture factory for Claude Code, enhanced with loop engineering — a meta-skill that turns a domain description into an agent team and the skills they use, with six pre-defined team-architecture patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, Hierarchical Delegation). Phase 6 검증과 Phase 7 진화를 수렴 루프·자기개선 루프로 강화한 버전. Fork of revfactory/harness.
